name: Sevak - The Confessions
overview: Sevak follows a journalist on the run with her informant as she investigates treacherous crimes. Caught in a web of deep subterfuge, they move from clue to clue, finding themselves in the midst of real terror events as they unravel.

trailers.title: Sevak - The Confessions | A Vidly Original (Official Trailer) | Releasing 26 November 2022
